ideation: This sequence aims to express the gentle, pure emotion associated with the white heart emoji. The animation will involve a slow, deliberate movement of both arms to create a gesture of offering or presenting something precious.  The arms will move in a synchronized manner, starting in a neutral position and gradually moving upward in a soft, embracing motion. The use of small, incremental adjustments in joint angles will create a graceful, non-robotic feel, fitting the delicate nature of the emoji.  The final pose will suggest a gentle embrace or presentation.

frames.beat: arms hang down, pure and still
arms slowly rise, opening like a gentle bloom
arms lift higher, presenting a soft, open heart
arms embrace gently, offering pure love
